title: The Rebuild at the PUSAN Film Festival
display_title: The Rebuild at the PUSAN Film Festival
wikitext:
[]: The Rebuild at the PUSAN Film Festival             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Sun Oct 14, 2007 4:59 am hi olds!)) ...the closure of the 12th Korea's PUSAN International Film Festival was the 12th of october... Here the photoreportage and below several photos of raw which I have kept before they have been removed. And there is lamo translation =).

[]: Re: The Rebuild at the Pusan Film Festival             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Oct 14, 2007 5:09 am CtHuLhU wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Oct 14, 2007 6:27 am Wooooow, CtHuLhU, you are officially awesome! Thanks so much for posting these! So, the subtitles were in English, and not in Korean?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 14, 2007 7:32 am Korean subtitles on the right, English subtitles on the bottom.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Oct 14, 2007 7:49 am Reichu wrote: Korean subtitles on the right, English subtitles on the bottom.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Oct 14, 2007 8:27 am Boy, I hope to God that this can hit some theaters stateside. But I won't hold my breath though. Btw, the graphics look infinitely better than NGE IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Oct 14, 2007 10:47 am WOAH WOAH WOAH WOAH THERE WAS A RAW?!?!?!?!?!! DOES THAT MEAN THERE WAS A VIDEO?!?!!?!?!?!?! AND THE RESOLUTION IS ACTUALLY GOOD!!!!!!!!!!!! I WANT TO SEE THIS NOW, GODDARN IT!!!!!!! YES , THIS MERITS MULTIPLE EXCLAMATION POINTS!!!!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Oct 14, 2007 10:50 am that is a lot of otaku

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Oct 14, 2007 10:56 am Also, this: Ultra win! EDIT: It appears the raw was just of the "next time" preview. Still, that's something I would absolutely love to see in non-cell phone quality.

[]: Re: The Rebuild at the Pusan Film Festival             Quote Post by V » Sun Oct 14, 2007 12:48 pm

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Oct 14, 2007 1:39 pm OMG Asuka and eva02......... Im speechless

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Oct 14, 2007 2:05 pm O.M.F.G And I don't mean "Oh Man Finally Gears-of-war"! About time we saw some Asuka!

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Oct 14, 2007 2:19 pm Wow, I'm so envious! Why can't Europe get things like this!? :[ That looks likes one massive, outdoor theatre. Seems like it would have been easy to sneak a video recorder in there and get a decent recording. /prays someone done that

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Oct 14, 2007 2:26 pm Geez NAveryW-kun, calm down a li'l.

[]: Only for a minority             Quote Post by XX » Sun Oct 14, 2007 2:50 pm CitizenGeek wrote: The fact that English subtitles exist mean there's a chance this could show up at quite a number of cinema festivals in Europe and the US.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Oct 14, 2007 2:54 pm But it might show up at the upcoming Fanime Con, which is what I'm hoping for.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Mon Oct 15, 2007 4:21 pm Me want. Me very very want. And Sachiel looks fucking awesome in that pic.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 15, 2007 4:26 pm Maybe the UK premiere at the Cambridge Film Festival next year -- we had Earthsea and Paprika this year.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 15, 2007 5:18 pm AuthenticM wrote: And Sachiel looks fucking awesome in that pic.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Oct 16, 2007 12:26 am Mr. Tines wrote: Maybe the UK premiere at the Cambridge Film Festival next year -- we had Earthsea and Paprika this year.
